name: Nsukka National University
description: Public research university in Enugu State, Nigeria. Faculty of Agriculture, Department of Crop Science.

name: East African Crop Research Institute
description: Regional institute advancing crop improvement and food security research across East Africa.

name: West African Agricultural Development Agency
description: Funds and coordinates agricultural development and biofortification research across West Africa.

name: Extension Services Foundation of Enugu State
description: Connecting smallholder farmer cooperatives with agricultural training and extension services.
